title: Onboarding - Eula page - License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box
scenario: EULA check box must be checked before Continue button becomes active during onboarding in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. On the EULA (End User License Agreement) screen, observe the License Agreement and Privacy Policy check box.
3. Tap the Continue button while the check box is unchecked.
4. Verify that the Continue button is inactive/grayed out and the user cannot proceed.
5. Tap the check box for License Agreement and Privacy Policy to check it.
6. Observe that a checkmark appears in the check box.
7. Verify that the Continue button becomes active/enabled.
expected: The Continue button is inactive when the check box is unchecked. After checking the box, a checkmark appears, the Continue button becomes active, and tapping it proceeds with the onboarding flow.
